publishedfiledetails.title: RETRO CARS RACE LITE VERSION
publishedfiledetails.description:
RETRO CARS RACE LITE VERSION

[h1]RETRO CARS RACE[/h1]

[i]When classic racing legends refuse to die… and the world burns around them.[/i]

[b]Retro Cars Race[/b] transforms Project Zomboid into a high-speed retro survival experience — delivering over [b]100 iconic race-inspired vehicles[/b] rebuilt with the raw soul of [b]classic motorsport, rally culture, and vintage racing history[/b].

These cars were once legends.

Now they’re weapons.

[b]Built for speed. Reborn for survival.[/b]

[h2]FEATURES[/h2]

[list]
[*][b]100+ retro racing vehicles[/b] based on KI5 framework
[*]Inspired by [b]classic racing, rally, and vintage motorsport[/b]
[*]Handcrafted skins with [b]high-detail textures and realistic wear[/b]
[*]Apocalypse-ready visuals: dirt, rust, damage, blood, and decay
[*]Distinct liveries — each car feels unique, not duplicated
[*]Perfect integration with Project Zomboid’s survival tone
[*]Multiplayer-ready: standout designs without breaking immersion
[/list]

[h2]PERFORMANCE & COMPATIBILITY[/h2]

[list]
[*]Optimized for performance (no unnecessary bloat)
[*]Smooth integration with KI5 vehicle base
[*]Easy installation — plug & play
[*]Compatible with most vehicle mods using the same framework
[/list]

[h2]COMMUNITY & SUPPORT[/h2]

Join the official community where the creator [b]ASINSINA[/b] shares mods, updates, and new projects:

[b]SOLSTICIO - LAFRONTERA[/b]
https://discord.gg/VCBpSqMyS4

Get updates, previews, and connect with other players.


[h2]AUTHOR NOTES[/h2]

Massive respect and thanks to [b]KI5[/b] for the incredible vehicle base that made this possible.

If you enjoy the mod:
Rate it
Leave feedback
Share it


[h2]MOD INFO[/h2]

Mod ID: RetroCarsRaceLite
